evals.name: conflicting-installs
evals.prompt: Audit and clean up the documentation in `evals/fixtures/conflicting-installs/`. Treat that directory as the project root (the README.md, docs/, AGENTS.md inside it). Don't modify the originals — copy the directory to the output location first, then make your changes there. Save your audit report and the cleaned-up files to the output location.

assertions.name: deprecated_api_removed
assertions.description: References to api-old.acme.com are removed from all output files

assertions.name: package_manager_conflict_resolved
assertions.description: Output settles on one package manager (npm or yarn) consistently across all files, OR explicitly documents that all are supported with one canonical default

assertions.name: current_api_preserved
assertions.description: api.acme.com/v2 endpoint is preserved in output

assertions.name: docker_option_preserved
assertions.description: Docker installation option (unique to getting-started.md) is preserved somewhere in output

assertions.name: port_preserved
assertions.description: Port 3000 is preserved in output

assertions.name: audit_report_produced
assertions.description: Output includes a structured audit report listing detected conflicts and drift

evals.name: deprecated-refs
evals.prompt: Audit and clean up the documentation in `evals/fixtures/deprecated-refs/`. Treat that directory as the project root. Don't modify the originals — copy the directory to the output location first, then make your changes there. Save your audit report and the cleaned-up files to the output location.

assertions.name: deprecated_build_script_removed
assertions.description: Reference to scripts/build.sh removed (or replaced with the actual scripts/run.sh build)

assertions.name: deprecated_deploy_script_removed
assertions.description: Reference to scripts/deploy.sh removed

assertions.name: deprecated_test_script_removed
assertions.description: Reference to scripts/test.sh removed

assertions.name: queue_driver_preserved
assertions.description: QueueDriver interface mention preserved (unique architectural detail)

assertions.name: rules_yaml_preserved
assertions.description: config/rules.yaml location preserved (unique to components.md)

assertions.name: port_8080_preserved
assertions.description: Port 8080 preserved

assertions.name: kafka_sqs_preserved
assertions.description: Kafka and SQS backing queues preserved

assertions.name: audit_report_produced
assertions.description: Output includes a structured audit report

evals.name: scattered-runbooks
evals.prompt: Audit and clean up the documentation in `evals/fixtures/scattered-runbooks/`. Treat that directory as the project root. Don't modify the originals — copy the directory to the output location first, then make your changes there. Save your audit report and the cleaned-up files to the output location.

assertions.name: agent_command_conflict_resolved
assertions.description: Output settles on `make agent-run` (which exists in Makefile) rather than `npm run agent` (which has no backing)

assertions.name: agent_config_path_resolved
assertions.description: Output settles on config/agent.yaml (matches Makefile) rather than agent.config.json

assertions.name: broker_port_preserved
assertions.description: Broker port 5672 preserved

assertions.name: worker_concurrency_preserved
assertions.description: Worker --workers flag preserved

assertions.name: worker_run_preserved
assertions.description: Worker run command python -m worker preserved

assertions.name: audit_report_produced
assertions.description: Output includes a structured audit report
